data.title: Did Jack Dorsey Create Bitcoin? VanEck Analyst Details ‘Compelling’ Connections Between Tech Mogul and Satoshi
data.description:
VanEck’s head of digital asset research says he holds a “strong belief” that Twitter founder Jack Dorsey is the pseudonymous creator of Bitcoin (BTC), Satoshi Nakamoto. Clarifying that his opinion is not necessarily shared by VanEck itself, Sigel says the evidence linking Dorsey to Satoshi – which he says includes “uncanny” coincidences and patterns – […]

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/18/did-jack-dorsey-create-bitcoin-vaneck-analyst-details-compelling-connections-between-tech-mogul-and-satoshi/

data.title: Mastercard shifts focus from crypto experimentation to “real solutions”
data.description:
Raj Dhamodharan, who heads Mastercard’s crypto and blockchain division, says many traditional finance firms, including Mastercard, are shifting their focus from crypto experimentation to practical solutions.  In a recent interview, Dhamodharan discussed “moving beyond (crypto) experimentation” and focusing on real solutions. He also mentioned Mastercard’s move to allow stablecoin payments for...
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mastercard-shifts-focus/

data.title: Tether co-founder launches rival stablecoin that offers yield
data.description:
The USP stablecoin will allow users to earn yield backed by bonds and other real-world assets.

data.title: Charles Schwab Creates Head of Digital Assets Role As Firm Positions To Offer Crypto Services: Report
data.description:
Charles Schwab is reportedly creating a new executive position as the financial service giant expands its tentacles into the crypto assets investment space. The new position, head of digital assets, will be responsible for Charles Schwab’s overall crypto assets strategy, reports Barron’s. data.title: Shiba Inu Burns 13 Million SHIB In One Transaction, But Daily Transactions Plummet: What's Going On?
data.description:
Despite a 30.4% decline in Shiba Inu's (CRYPTO: SHIB) price over the past month, the community continues its burn mechanism to reduce supply. However, the latest burn rate remains weak, signaling a limited impact on price momentum.

source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/02/43795751/shiba-inu-burns-13-million-shib-in-one-transaction-but-daily-transactions-plummet-whats-go?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: OpenSea ends XP rewards for listing & bidding due to community backlash
data.description:
OpenSea has decided to pause its new XP rewards for listing and bidding on NFTs on the platform after backlash from the community.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/opensea-ends-xp-rewards-for-listing-bidding/

data.title: FTX announces next repayment round for May
data.description:

data.title: Hayden Davis Opens Up After LIBRA Crypto Controversy: Confirms Involvement in MELANIA Coin Launch

CZ Refutes Binance Sale Rumors After Recent Asset Transfers
data.description:
Despite asset transfer speculation, CZ confirms Binance is not for sale, though the exchange is open to strategic partnerships and mergers.
